items.title: S01E01 - Supergran and The Magic Ray
items.summary: While watching her grandson play football, Granny Smith (Gudrun Ure) is hit by a ray created by Inventor Black (Bill Shine), giving her magical powers

infolabels.title: Supergran and The Magic Ray
infolabels.plot: While watching her grandson play football, Granny Smith (Gudrun Ure) is hit by a ray created by Inventor Black (Bill Shine), giving her magical powers

items.title: S01E02 - Supergran and the Skimmer
items.summary: Inventor Black is warmly invited to exhibit his latest invention, the Skimmer, at the prestigious Modern Times exhibition in Chisleton, so, Supergran takes it for a test run.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Skimmer
infolabels.plot: Inventor Black is warmly invited to exhibit his latest invention, the Skimmer, at the prestigious Modern Times exhibition in Chisleton, so, Supergran takes it for a test run.

items.title: S01E03 - Supergran and the Course of True Love
items.summary: Eccentric Scotish millionaire Angus McSporran comes to Chisleton to ask Supergran for his hand in marriage.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Course of True Love
infolabels.plot: Eccentric Scotish millionaire Angus McSporran comes to Chisleton to ask Supergran for his hand in marriage.

items.title: S01E04 - Supergran and the Pearl of Pinnell's End
items.summary: The Scunner plans to grab the fabled Pearl of Pinnels End right from under the chin of Mrs. Digby Day by using Inventor Black's latest, greatest invention: the Invisible Shield.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Pearl of Pinnell's End
infolabels.plot: The Scunner plans to grab the fabled Pearl of Pinnels End right from under the chin of Mrs. Digby Day by using Inventor Black's latest, greatest invention: the Invisible Shield.

items.title: S01E05 - Supergran and the Super Match
items.summary: The Chisleton Athletics are facing off against the unbeatable Mighty Rovers and even with the encouragement of Supergran, it seems like the hometown boys stand no chance at all.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Super Match
infolabels.plot: The Chisleton Athletics are facing off against the unbeatable Mighty Rovers and even with the encouragement of Supergran, it seems like the hometown boys stand no chance at all.

items.title: S01E06 - Supergran Grounded
items.summary: The honorable Bertrand Battenburg visits Chisleton and Mad Mick of Merseyside is out to replace him with a mechanical double (and kidnap the original copy). Unfortunately, Supergran, who is supposed to protect the Battenburg boy, gets hits on the head with a log thrown by Geoff Capes and loses her superpowers.

infolabels.title: Supergran Grounded
infolabels.plot: The honorable Bertrand Battenburg visits Chisleton and Mad Mick of Merseyside is out to replace him with a mechanical double (and kidnap the original copy). Unfortunately, Supergran, who is supposed to protect the Battenburg boy, gets hits on the head with a log thrown by Geoff Capes and loses her superpowers.

items.title: S01E07 - Supergran and the Magic Ian
items.summary: Supergran comes to the aid of The Great Renaldo (birth name: Ronald MacDonald) and his mother Clinging Ivey.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Magic Ian
infolabels.plot: Supergran comes to the aid of The Great Renaldo (birth name: Ronald MacDonald) and his mother Clinging Ivey.

items.title: S01E08 - Supergran and the TV Villains
items.summary: While Supergran is taking driving lessons, the rest of Chisleton is excited about the arrival of film company Convix Pix.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the TV Villains
infolabels.plot: While Supergran is taking driving lessons, the rest of Chisleton is excited about the arrival of film company Convix Pix.

items.title: S01E09 - Supergran and the Doppelganger
items.summary: Glaswegian master of disguise Greta Garboils teams with the Scunner and dresses up like Supergran (with the Muscles posing as Willie & Edison) to commit crimes. Soon the real Supergran is arrested and put on bread and water in the Chisleton police station.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Doppelganger
infolabels.plot: Glaswegian master of disguise Greta Garboils teams with the Scunner and dresses up like Supergran (with the Muscles posing as Willie & Edison) to commit crimes. Soon the real Supergran is arrested and put on bread and water in the Chisleton police station.

items.title: S01E10 - Supergran and the Day at the Sea
items.summary: Supergran and Willie are enjoying a day out in Paddleton upon Sea. However the Scunner and his accomplices are also there, trying to get their hands on the widow Groggelbank's dog.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Day at the Sea
infolabels.plot: Supergran and Willie are enjoying a day out in Paddleton upon Sea. However the Scunner and his accomplices are also there, trying to get their hands on the widow Groggelbank's dog.

items.title: S01E11 - Supergran and the Raid on Race Day
items.summary: Chisleton has got marathon fever. Even the Scunner and his cronies are practicing, but only so they can rob the Chisleton bank on race day.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Raid on Race Day
infolabels.plot: Chisleton has got marathon fever. Even the Scunner and his cronies are practicing, but only so they can rob the Chisleton bank on race day.

items.title: S01E12 - Supergran and the Raving Beauty Contest
items.summary: When Supergran organizes a Chisleton Beauty Contest, the Scunner is tasked by the head of the Gangster Guild to make sure her daughter Wanda ends up the winner.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Raving Beauty Contest
infolabels.plot: When Supergran organizes a Chisleton Beauty Contest, the Scunner is tasked by the head of the Gangster Guild to make sure her daughter Wanda ends up the winner.

items.title: S01E13 - Supergran and the Missing Hissing
items.summary: The Scunner Campbell is chasing a winning lottery ticket lost by a gust of wind.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Missing Hissing
infolabels.plot: The Scunner Campbell is chasing a winning lottery ticket lost by a gust of wind.

items.title: S02E01 - Supergran and the Racing Cert
items.summary: The Great Chisleton Pigeon Race is about to begin, with pop star Newcastle Brown's bird, Fast Flo, as hot favourite.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Racing Cert
infolabels.plot: The Great Chisleton Pigeon Race is about to begin, with pop star Newcastle Brown's bird, Fast Flo, as hot favourite.

items.title: S02E02 - Supergran and the Treasure Trovers
items.summary: Can even Supergran make it in time? The Scunner Campbell up a tree, PC Norman in quick sand, PC Leekie locked in his own prison cell.... and the very last egg of the Flying Diplodocus about to be snaffled!

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Treasure Trovers
infolabels.plot: Can even Supergran make it in time? The Scunner Campbell up a tree, PC Norman in quick sand, PC Leekie locked in his own prison cell.... and the very last egg of the Flying Diplodocus about to be snaffled!

items.title: S02E03 - Supergran and the Birthday Dambuster
items.summary: The Scunner Campbell has left town for a new career in the Royal Paddleton Air Force. Life as a non-flying ace has its ups and downs, and Supergran end up helping the Scunner escape under the wire...

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Birthday Dambuster
infolabels.plot: The Scunner Campbell has left town for a new career in the Royal Paddleton Air Force. Life as a non-flying ace has its ups and downs, and Supergran end up helping the Scunner escape under the wire...

items.title: S02E04 - Supergran and the Yankee Doodle's Boodle
items.summary: It's American week in Chisleton, and the Scunner Campbell sets up a daring oceanic scam. Can Supergran save this ship of fools as it heads for the rocks?

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Yankee Doodle's Boodle
infolabels.plot: It's American week in Chisleton, and the Scunner Campbell sets up a daring oceanic scam. Can Supergran save this ship of fools as it heads for the rocks?

items.title: S02E05 - Supergran and the Rookie Recruit
items.summary: When Derek Dumpling joins the Chisleton Constabulary, Supergran must thwart the Scunner Campbell's most daring exploit yet, before Derek has to hand in his truncheon....

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Rookie Recruit
infolabels.plot: When Derek Dumpling joins the Chisleton Constabulary, Supergran must thwart the Scunner Campbell's most daring exploit yet, before Derek has to hand in his truncheon....

items.title: S02E06 - Supergran and the State Visit
items.summary: Madge, Duches of Claridge, is due on an official visit to Chisleton. So is Hetty the Hat, kleptomaniac extraordinaire. Even Scunner Campbell can tell the difference between them, can't he? Does Supergran have the speed and wits to avoid a diplomatic incident?

infolabels.title: Supergran and the State Visit
infolabels.plot: Madge, Duches of Claridge, is due on an official visit to Chisleton. So is Hetty the Hat, kleptomaniac extraordinaire. Even Scunner Campbell can tell the difference between them, can't he? Does Supergran have the speed and wits to avoid a diplomatic incident?

items.title: S02E07 - Chiselton Street Blues
items.summary: A sad little pile of clothes by the seashore, and the Scunner Campbell is no more. The whole of Chisleton mourns the passing of it's most infamous villain...

infolabels.title: Chiselton Street Blues
infolabels.plot: A sad little pile of clothes by the seashore, and the Scunner Campbell is no more. The whole of Chisleton mourns the passing of it's most infamous villain...

items.title: S02E08 - Supergran and the School for Scoundrels
items.summary: Sid Scoundrel arrives in town to open his latest Academy of Crime. Naturally, Scunner Campbell is the first to enrol, and in the crime-wave which threatens to engulf Chisleton, Supergran is knocked out by Essence of School Dinners and tied to the railway track.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the School for Scoundrels
infolabels.plot: Sid Scoundrel arrives in town to open his latest Academy of Crime. Naturally, Scunner Campbell is the first to enrol, and in the crime-wave which threatens to engulf Chisleton, Supergran is knocked out by Essence of School Dinners and tied to the railway track.

items.title: S02E09 - Supergran and the Media Star
items.summary: The most dastardly act ever aginst the citizens of Chiselton - someone is sabotaging all the television sets !

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Media Star
infolabels.plot: The most dastardly act ever aginst the citizens of Chiselton - someone is sabotaging all the television sets !

items.title: S02E10 - Supergran Snookered
items.summary: Katherine 'Cat' Burglar is, as the Scunner Campbell discovers, a snooker ace. He manages her to stardom... and sets up the Frame of the Century!

infolabels.title: Supergran Snookered
infolabels.plot: Katherine 'Cat' Burglar is, as the Scunner Campbell discovers, a snooker ace. He manages her to stardom... and sets up the Frame of the Century!

items.title: S02E11 - Supergran and the Fancy Dress Fanciers
items.summary: Empress Rita is throwing her annual party. Dress designer Neville Mince falls victim to Goldilocks and the three bears....

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Fancy Dress Fanciers
infolabels.plot: Empress Rita is throwing her annual party. Dress designer Neville Mince falls victim to Goldilocks and the three bears....

items.title: S02E12 - Supergran and the Chronic Crooner
items.summary: Country and Western Week empties Chisleton once again, offering the Scunner a golden opprotunity.

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Chronic Crooner
infolabels.plot: Country and Western Week empties Chisleton once again, offering the Scunner a golden opprotunity.

items.title: S02E13 - Supergran and the Heir Apparent
items.summary: Does the aristochractic blood of the Great Sporran of the Isles flow through the veins of the Scunner Campbell? Supergran must find out with a trip to the haunted Castle Haggis...

infolabels.title: Supergran and the Heir Apparent
infolabels.plot: Does the aristochractic blood of the Great Sporran of the Isles flow through the veins of the Scunner Campbell? Supergran must find out with a trip to the haunted Castle Haggis...
